title: Australian Tofu Bowl
description: A creamy and savory bowl filled with the flavors of Australia, featuring marinated tofu as the main protein.
instructions: Cut the tofu into small cubes and place them on a baking sheet.
Drizzle the tofu with 1 tsp of cooking oil and sprinkle with 1 tsp of salty.
Bake the tofu in the oven for 20-25 minutes, flipping halfway through.
While the tofu is baking, mix the creamy and 1 tsp of salty in a small bowl.
Once the tofu is done, remove it from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Place the tofu in a bowl and drizzle with the creamy sauce.
